results: tsc --noEmit: 0 errors in new BE foundation code (41 errors in legacy scaffold code — deferred to auth_accounts module, RF-003)
Unified OpenAPI spec (contract_output/global/openapi_unified.json): valid JSON, 1 path, 2 schemas, 5 response templates, 10 tags, 10-step middleware pipeline, 6 rate limit tiers

Middleware pipeline: 10 middleware positions aligned with architecture (request_id, cors, helmet, rate_limit, auth_session, role_permission_check, input_validation, business_rule_guard, audit_log, error_handler)
Services: 6 services implemented (authService, auditLogService, rateLimitService, rolePermissionService, emailService-scaffold, jobQueueService-scaffold)
Error envelope: AppError + ValidationError classes match architecture ApiError schema { error, message, statusCode, details? }
Security: CORS (credentials:true), security headers (nosniff, DENY, HSTS), session (httpOnly, secure, sameSite:lax, 7d maxAge)
Environment: 14 env vars validated via Zod schema matching environment_config_schema.json
No duplicate routes or middleware registrations detected in new code
No debug logs or temporary diagnostics in new code (console.error used only for operational error logging in audit/job services)

notes: Middleware pipeline: createHandler() with request_id + error_handler built-in; per-route middleware via array composition
Auth: session-based with httpOnly cookies, crypto.scrypt for password hashing, max 5 concurrent sessions, 24h reset token
RBAC: single-role MVP (admin), assertRole() service + requireRole() middleware
Rate limiting: 6 tiers matching architecture (auth_login, auth_recovery, auth_reset, public_read, public_write, coupon_check), in-memory sliding window
Audit: fire-and-forget DB writes to AuditLog table, separate logEvent/logSecurityEvent, middleware + handler wrapper patterns
Validation: Zod-based validateBody/validateQuery middleware with field-level error details
Business rules: composeRules() factory for per-endpoint rule composition (rules to be filled per module)
Email: adapter pattern (sendEmail creates PENDING CommunicationLog, renderTemplate for {{variable}} substitution, sendTriggeredEmail checks Automation)
Job queue: registerJob/runJob/listJobs skeleton (MVP in-process, production: BullMQ + Redis)
Env config: Zod schema validates all 14 env vars from environment_config_schema.json
OpenAPI unified: initialized at contract_output/global/openapi_unified.json with shared security schemes, error envelope, tags, middleware pipeline, rate limit tiers
Legacy code: 41 TS errors from old scaffold (db.user, old RBAC, old security modules) — does not affect new pipeline, deferred to auth_accounts module (RF-003)
Fixed 3 minor TS issues in new code: businessRules.ts and rateLimit.ts implicit returns, auditLogService.ts Prisma JSON null type

history.summary: DB agent global foundation run started. Full schema replacement from generic RBAC to domain-specific models (16 models, 12 enums). Canonical paths resolved. Git preflight passed: branch impl/global/db created from main.
Phase C testing passed. Schema validated, Prisma client generated, seed TypeScript compiles cleanly, migration SQL generates all 12 enums and 16 tables. Ready for commit approval.

BE agent global foundation run started. Git preflight passed: impl/global/db merged into main by user approval, impl/global/be created from main. Carry-over of dirty working tree approved. Scope: middleware pipeline, auth/session, RBAC, rate-limiting, audit logging, error envelope, env config validation, email service adapter, job queue skeleton, OpenAPI unified spec.

BE global foundation completed. All 10 middleware positions implemented. 6 services created (auth, audit, rate limit, RBAC, email adapter, job queue). Error envelope standardized. Env config validated. CORS + security headers configured. Unified OpenAPI initialized. Testing passed: 0 errors in new code (41 legacy errors deferred). 3 minor TS issues fixed. 5 red flags logged (RF-002 resolved, RF-003 deferred, RF-004/RF-005 accepted).
